question: Will OpenAI make GPT-5.6 generally available before July 12, 2026?

factors.description: Base rate: announced 'coming weeks' GA landing within ~2 weeks of announcement
Altman reportedly hoped for GA ~July 10, right at the boundary, but such targets slip
Government clearance delay risk; Anthropic Fable5/Mythos5 pulled back; customer-by-customer approval precedes broad GA
'Coming weeks' plural + deliberately staggered rollout leans to later part of July 10-17 window; deadline at early edge
Broad YES definition: any of ChatGPT/API/Codex; an official 'available to all of a tier' phased post counts even if staggered
Strong OpenAI momentum; company frames gating as a 'short-term step' and wants broad access ASAP

summary: GPT-5.6 was announced June 26, 2026 as a government-gated limited preview, with GA promised "in the coming weeks." Independent estimates cluster July 10–17 and Altman reportedly hoped for ~July 10 — right at the July 11 deadline boundary. The deadline captures only the early tail of the likely GA-date distribution (which centers ~July 13–17), with asymmetric delay risk from government clearance (Anthropic's Fable5/Mythos5 were pulled back by the US govt) and METR safety review. Offsetting this, the YES bar is low: an official "rolling out to all of a tier" post on any one of ChatGPT/API/Codex counts, even if staggered. Net probability ~0.30.
reasoning:
**Forecast: 30% (NO more likely)**

OpenAI announced GPT-5.6 as a government-gated limited preview on June 26, 2026, promising general availability "in the coming weeks." The July 11 deadline sits at the **early edge** of the July 10–17 estimate window:

- **Against YES:** Government-clearance delay risk is real (Anthropic's Fable5/Mythos5 were pulled back by the US govt), the rollout is deliberately staggered customer-by-customer, "coming weeks" plural leans toward the later part of the window, and Altman's optimistic ~July 10 target routinely slips.
- **For YES:** The bar is low — an official "rolling out to all of a tier" post on any one of ChatGPT/API/Codex counts even if staggered, and OpenAI has strong momentum and explicitly frames the gating as temporary.

The GA-date distribution likely centers ~July 13–17, putting the July 11 deadline around the 25–35th percentile. Final probability: **0.30**.
